zh.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy於1046年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪。她於大約1066年與Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne在法國皮卡迪結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1129年9月2日在她的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy于1046年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪。她于大约1066年与Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne在法国皮卡迪结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1129年9月2日在她的家乡享年83岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy was born in 1046, in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. She married Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne about 1066, in Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 September 1129, in her hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy est née en 1046, à Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Elle a épousé Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne environ 1066, à Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 septembre 1129, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy wurde 1046 in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat um 1066 in Picardie, Frankreich Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. September 1129 im Alter von 83 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy è nata il nel 1046 nel Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Lei sposato Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne circa 1066, nel Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 settembre 1129, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucyは1046年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメモントディディエルで生まれた。約1066年にフランスピカーディでGeoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1129年9月2日に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy(은)는 1046년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 몽디디어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1066년 프랑스 피카디에서 Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1129년 9월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy nasceu em 1046, em Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Ela casou-se com Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne aproximadamente 1066, em Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1129, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy родилась в 1046 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne около 1066 г. в местности пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 сентября 1129 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

sm.from 1068 to 1135: mai le 1068 e o'o I le 1135

es.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy nació en 1046, en Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Se casó con Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne aproximadamente 1066, en Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1129, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
